expectations.text: Output filename follows SwiftBar naming convention with refresh interval
expectations.evidence: File named minutes-to-hour.1m.sh — kebab-case name, 1m interval, .sh extension

expectations.text: Script starts with a valid shebang line
Script contains xbar metadata tags (at least xbar.title and xbar.desc)
expectations.evidence: Lines 3-6: xbar.title, xbar.version, xbar.author, xbar.desc all present

expectations.text: Output includes --- separator between header and dropdown content
Script correctly calculates minutes remaining to next hour
expectations.evidence: Lines 11-12: uses date +%-M (no leading zero) and 60 - current_minute

expectations.text: Dropdown includes a manual refresh option with refresh=true
